productDisplayName: Puma Women Black Core Track Pants
description: Composition Black track pants made of 80% cotton and 20% polyester, has an elasticated waist with a drawstring on the inside, printed branding on the right waist and embroidered puma Leaping cat on the right back Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in lukewarm water with similar colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron Designed for the sporty soul, this trackpant from puma is crafted from soft and absorbant cotton-polyester fabric that offers exemplary comfort. The comfortable elasticated waistband sits snug, while you can further customise the fit with the drawstring. Slip into these tracks when blazing the trail or on casual day and revel in heavenly comfort. Model statistics Product is of length 103 cm on a model of height 5.7' and waist 28"
